titleStmt.title: SII 9.543: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 543. (A.R. No. 8 of 1904.) ON THE WEST BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VITTHALASVAMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Māgha, ba. 10 corresponding to A.D. 1532, January 31, Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It records the gift of the villages (1) Hepe, (2) Cheḷuvanahāḷu and (3) Āneganahāḷu for offerings to the god Viṭṭhaladēva made by Tāḷapāka Tirumalayya of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Āśvalāyana-sūtra and Ṛik-śākhā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1453 ṟaneya kharasaṁvatsarada māgha ba 10 lū śrīmatu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraAcyutarāyamahārāyarū pṛthvīrājyaṁ gaiuttaṁ Iralu śrīmadvēdamārgapratiṣṭhācāryarāda Āśvalāyanasūtrada bhāradvājagōtrada rukuśākhādhyāyigaḷā
da tāḷapāka tirumalayyaṁgaḷu śrīviṭhaladēvarige samarpisida grāma . namage Acyutarāyamahārāyarū dhārāpūrvakavāgi tāṁbraśāsana ṇa sīme voḷage vikhyāta
ceḷuvanahāḷa grāma 1 kāluvaḷi Āneganahāḷa grāma 1 hepeya grāma 1 I mūru grāmake saluva catussīmevoḷagāda Aṣṭabhōgatējassvāmya sakalanidhinikṣēpādisahitavāgi Ī mūru grāmavanū
Ēkādaśi puṇyakāladalu . dēvara nityanaivēdya kaṭṭaḷege
hepeya grāma 1 caḷuvanahāḷa grāma 1 Āneganahāḷa grāma 1 Ā mūṟu grā
makaṁ ro rēkhe va ga 1350 kaṁ saluvadu nityanaivēdya dīpārādhane harivāṇa 1 ke ga 1
Upanaivēdya di 14 ke va ga 14 Aṁṇamarasaṁgaḷa
Ā va ga 1350 Ī mariyāde yallinaivēdyavanū māḍi putrapautrapāraṁpari
rāgi naḍasuvarāgi nāugaḷu koṭeU .
Digital edition of SII 9.543 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
